SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.Memory

Class DuckAddresses

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.Memory.DuckAddresses
public class DuckAddresses extends Object
This file contains constant addresses in memory and descriptors of each. This acts as the central "address book" for the emulator.
